wizard.chooseMode: How would you like to connect?
wizard.modeNutDirectDesc: I already have a NUT server running
wizard.modeSnmpSetupDesc: Help me configure NUT to monitor an SNMP UPS
wizard.modeSerialSetupDesc: Help me configure NUT to monitor a UPS over RS-232 serial
wizard.modeUsbHidSetupDesc: Help me configure NUT usbhid-ups with experimental Windows HID support
wizard.mapSubtitle: We found {{count}} variables. Please check if the default mapping is correct.
wizard.lineSubtitle: Confirm your mains voltage and frequency. These are used to display the normal operating range on charts.
wizard.connectSubtitle: Configure your NUT server connection to get started.
wizard.nutDownloadDesc: Download the latest NUT for Windows release, decompress the zip file into a new folder, then select the folder below.
wizard.serialSetupDesc: Download the latest NUT for Windows release, decompress the zip file into a new folder, select it, then configure serial driver, COM port, and ttymode below.
wizard.usbHidSetupDesc: Download the experimental NUT Windows build with HID support, decompress it into a new folder, select it, then configure usbhid-ups below.
wizard.nutDownloadExperimentalLink: Download experimental NUT build with USB HID support
wizard.nutFolderInvalid: Folder is not a valid NUT folder
wizard.serialDriverDisabledNoFolder: Choose and validate a NUT folder first
wizard.serialDriverHint: Only drivers found in this NUT folder are listed.
wizard.serialHclLink: Need help choosing a driver? Search the NUT Hardware Compatibility List
wizard.serialNoDriversFound: No known serial driver binaries were found in this folder
wizard.serialNoComPorts: No COM ports detected. Click refresh after connecting the UPS serial cable.
wizard.serialPortInvalid: Enter a valid COM port such as COM3
wizard.usbHidPortHint: Fixed to auto for this experimental Windows build
wizard.usbHidVidPidRequired: Enter both Vendor ID and Product ID, or disable Specify VID/PID
wizard.usbHidFixedFlagsHint: experimentalhid and pollonly are currently fixed ON and cannot be changed on Windows.
wizard.usbHidMissingDriverBinary: Missing required USB HID driver binary: {{paths}}. Please download the experimental NUT build from the link above.
wizard.usbHidMissingExperimentalhid: usbhid-ups.exe is present, but this build is not compatible with Windows USB HID setup (missing required experimentalhid support). Please download the required Windows-compatible experimental build from the link above.
wizard.usbHidRunHelpFailed: Found usbhid-ups.exe, but failed to verify Windows HID compatibility from usbhid-ups.exe -h output. This build may be incompatible. Please download the required Windows-compatible experimental build from the link above.
wizard.prepareHint: This writes NUT configuration files (ups.conf, upsd.conf) and starts local snmp-ups/upsd immediately. If the folder is protected, an administrator permission prompt will appear.
wizard.prepareSerialHint: This writes NUT configuration files (ups.conf, upsd.conf) and starts the selected local serial driver plus upsd immediately. If the folder is protected, an administrator permission prompt will appear.
wizard.prepareUsbHidHint: This writes NUT configuration files (ups.conf, upsd.conf) and starts local usbhid-ups plus upsd immediately. If the folder is protected, an administrator permission prompt will appear.
wizard.prepareLocalUsbHid: Configure and Start USB HID Driver
wizard.initializingSerialDriver: Configuring and starting serial driver, waiting for driver initialization...
wizard.serialComPortAccess: Unable to open {{port}}. The port is in use or access is denied. Close other serial software and retry.
wizard.serialComPortMissing: {{port}} is no longer available. Reconnect the serial cable, refresh COM ports, and retry.
wizard.serialDriverInitTimeout: Driver started, but UPS status did not leave WAIT in time. Check COM port, cable, and selected driver.
wizard.serialDriverStartupFailed: Serial driver failed to start. Check port and driver settings, then retry.
wizard.usbHidNoMatchingUps: No matching HID UPS found. Check USB cable/power and optional VID/PID settings, then retry.
wizard.usbHidNoMatchingUpsTitle: No matching USB HID UPS found
wizard.usbHidNoMatchingUpsBody: The driver started but could not match a HID UPS. Verify USB cable/power and optional VID/PID values, then retry.
wizard.serialDriverOutputBody: The local serial driver returned startup output that may explain the failure.
wizard.snmpDriverOutputBody: The local SNMP driver returned startup output that may explain the failure.
wizard.configApplied: NUT configured and local processes started successfully
wizard.nutFolderNeedsUac: NUT folder structure is valid, but writing config requires administrator permission. A UAC prompt will appear when you continue.
wizard.upsNameInvalid: UPS name may only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens
wizard.snmpPortInvalid: Enter a valid IP address or IP:port

batterySafety.warningAlertBody: Battery level has dropped to {{percent}}%. Warning threshold is {{threshold}}%.
batterySafety.criticalAlertBody: Battery is at {{percent}}%. Shutdown threshold ({{threshold}}%) has been reached.
batterySafety.fsdAlertBody: The UPS has issued a Forced Shutdown (FSD) signal. The system will shut down shortly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.connectionDescription: Launch the setup wizard to reconfigure the NUT server address, port, and authentication details.
settings.connectionDescriptionEnteringWizard: Please wait a moment. The app is closing background UPS services before opening the wizard.
settings.toleranceHint: Tolerance values control both the green charts band and the alert notification thresholds.
settings.fsdDescription: When the UPS issues a Forced Shutdown (FSD) signal via ups.status, automatically shut down this computer.
settings.startHiddenToTrayHint: Only applies when started with Windows

reconnect.title: Connection Lost
reconnect.messageInitializing: Starting local UPS driver. This can take a moment on cold start.
reconnect.messageConnecting: Attempting to reconnect to the NUT server...
reconnect.driverLogSummaryComOpen: Driver failed to open {{port}}. The port may be busy, inaccessible, or disconnected.
reconnect.driverLogSummaryPrecheckMissing: Configured serial port {{port}} was not found before launching the driver.
reconnect.driverLogSummaryGeneric: Driver launch failed during cold start. Review logs below for details.
reconnect.driverLogSummaryUsbHidGeneric: usbhid-ups failed during startup. Check the USB cable, UPS power, and optional VID/PID settings, then retry.
reconnect.driverLogSummaryUsbHidNoMatchingUps: usbhid-ups started, but no matching HID UPS was found. Check the USB cable, UPS power, and optional VID/PID settings, then retry.
reconnect.driverLogTargetPortMissing: No target COM port was parsed from the driver configuration. Re-configure serial settings in wizard.
reconnect.driverLogRescanSuccess: {{port}} detected. You can continue to retry driver startup.
reconnect.driverLogRescanMissing: {{port}} not found. Reconnect cable/device, then rescan.
reconnect.driverLogRetryFailed: Driver retry failed. Resolve issue and rescan before continuing.
reconnect.driverLogRetryFailedDirect: Driver retry failed. Resolve the issue and try again.
